pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier logic confirm requirements for color space channel swapping, monochrome conversion, 50% contrast scaling, and MP4 generation.
Task description mandates creating accessible video variants using filtering and grading techniques.
O*NET / BLS SOC definitions for 'Computer Occupations, All Other' which includes specialized digital accessibility roles, matching the task prompt.
Prompt explicitly states the agent works at a 'science curriculum developer' producing educational demo videos.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated 10-second MP4 video of a chemistry titration demonstration (854x480 resolution) simulating a pH indicator change from green to red. The agent must apply color space manipulation to swap the red and blue channels (daltonization) and generate a high-contrast monochrome version with exactly 50% contrast enhancement over the original grayscale baseline. The verifier explicitly tests frames at t=8s via OpenCV to measure BGR channel values, grayscale variance, and root-mean-square (RMS) contrast ratios.
